name: control mapping: reviewed_by:<r>:<d> format requires reviewer name AND ISO-8601 date (e.g. reviewed_by:legal-team:2026-05-04)
command:
printf -- "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: reviewed_by:not-a-date-format
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-controls-yaml.sh" "$PWD/controls.yaml"
